title: Iron Oak
description: Farm ore infused trees instead of mining
body:
# Iron Oak

This mod aims to add several ore infused oak trees. This allows you to plant and farm ingot instead of mining them in
the dark.

## Processing

To create your first *iron infused oak sapling* you have to create *iron infused bone meal*.

![Crafting Iron Bone Meal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mini-mammoth/iron-oak/main/docs/crafting_iron_bone_meal.png)

Apply this to any oak sapling to magically infuse the sapling:

![Create Iron Saplings](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mini-mammoth/iron-oak/main/docs/create_iron_sapling.gif)

Once the sapling is infused, you will see it grow into an *iron infused oak*. Cutting this tree will give you *iron
infused logs* which can be processed into ingot. But be careful if you cut this logs into planks all sparks of iron ore
getting lost.

![Iron Oak Tree](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mini-mammoth/iron-oak/main/docs/iron_oak_tree.png)

Next you have to craft a *fire bowl*

![Crafting Fire Bowl](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mini-mammoth/iron-oak/main/docs/crafting_fire_bowl.png)

This allows you to safely burn the logs and collect the ashes. Burning *iron infused logs* inside a fire bowl will
produce *iron infused ash*.

![Create Iron Ash](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mini-mammoth/iron-oak/main/docs/create_iron_ash.gif)

Now you can use water to wash the *iron infused ash* to receive *iron shreds*.

![Wash Iron Shreds](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mini-mammoth/iron-oak/main/docs/create_iron_shred.gif)

Once you have collected 9 shreds you can craft a *raw iron*.

![Crafting Iron Ore](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mini-mammoth/iron-oak/main/docs/iron_shred_to_ore.png)

Alternatively, you smelt the iron shred into nuggets.

![Burn Iron Nuggets](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mini-mammoth/iron-oak/main/docs/iron_shred_furnace.png)
